title: Output Committer Management
description: The 'lib/output/committer' directory in Hadoop MapReduce is responsible for managing job output commitment. It ensures data consistency and integrity, employing Strategy and inheritance patterns. Collaborating with Hadoop's logging and file system utilities, it supports auditing compatibility via 'AuditingIntegration.java'. This directory adheres to Hadoop's architectural standards, maintaining job output reliability.
